name: Cardiorespiratory Fitness
description: This test case evaluates the ability to identify patients who have undergone cardiorespiratory fitness testing, typically through exercise stress testing or cardiopulmonary exercise testing. The phenotype is from the eMERGE Mayo Network.
prompt: Find all patients who have had cardiorespiratory fitness testing performed, including exercise stress tests or cardiopulmonary exercise testing with oxygen consumption measurements.

required_codes.display: Cardiovascular stress test using maximal or submaximal treadmill or bicycle exercise
